 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL">Forward-looking statements </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </B></P> <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>

<P STYLE="font-size:12pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;
</P><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">It should be noted that Nokia and its businesses are exposed to various risks and uncertainties and certain statements
herein that are not historical facts are forward-looking statements, including, without limitation, those regarding: </P> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>

<TR>
<TD WIDTH="23" VALIGN="top" ALIGN="left">A)</TD>
<TD ALIGN="left" VALIGN="top">expectations, plans or benefits related to Nokia&#146;s strategies; </TD></TR></TABLE> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>

<TD WIDTH="23" VALIGN="top" ALIGN="left">B)</TD>

 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL">INTRODUCTION AND USE OF CERTAIN TERMS </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Corporation is a public limited liability company incorporated under the laws of the Republic of Finland. In this document, any reference to &#147;we,&#148;
&#147;us,&#148; &#147;the Group&#148; or &#147;Nokia&#148; means Nokia Corporation and its subsidiaries on a consolidated basis and which refers generally to Nokia&#146;s continuing operations, except where we separately specify that the term means
Nokia Corporation or a particular subsidiary or business segment only or the discontinued operations, and except that references to &#147;our shares&#148;, matter relating to our shares or matters of corporate governance refer to the shares and
corporate governance of Nokia Corporation. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Corporation has published its consolidated financial statements in euro for periods beginning on or after
January&nbsp;1, 1999. In this annual report on Form 20-F, references to &#147;EUR,&#148; &#147;euro&#148; or &#147;<FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:ARIAL">&#128;</FONT></FONT>&#148; are to the common currency of the
European Economic and Monetary Union, and references to &#147;dollars&#148;, &#147;US dollars&#148;, &#147;USD&#148; or &#147;$&#148; are to the currency of the United States. Solely for the convenience of the reader, this annual report on Form 20-F
contains conversions of selected euro amounts into US dollars at specified rates, or, if not so specified, at the rate of 1.2101 US dollars per euro, which was the noon buying rate in New York City for cable transfers in euro as certified for
customs purposes by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York on December&nbsp;31, 2014. No representation is made that the amounts have been, could have been or could be converted into US dollars at the rates indicated or at any other rates. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Corporation furnishes Citibank, N.A., as Depositary, with consolidated financial statements and a related audit opinion of our independent auditors annually.
These financial statements are prepared on the basis of International Financial Reporting Standards as issued by the International Accounting Standards Board and in conformity with IFRS as adopted by the European Union (&#147;IFRS&#148;). In
accordance with the rules and regulations of the SEC, we do not provide a reconciliation of net income and shareholders&#146; equity in our consolidated financial statements to accounting principles generally accepted in the United States, or US
GAAP. We also furnish the Depositary with quarterly reports containing unaudited financial information prepared on the basis of IFRS, as well as all notices of shareholders&#146; meetings and other reports and communications that are made available
generally to our shareholders. The Depositary makes these notices, reports and communications available for inspection by record holders of ADRs, evidencing ADS, and distributes to all record holders of ADRs notices of shareholders&#146; meetings
received by the Depositary. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">In addition to the materials delivered to holders of ADRs by the Depositary, holders can access our consolidated financial statements,
and other information included in our annual reports and proxy materials, at company.nokia.com/financials. This annual report on Form 20-F is also available at company.nokia.com/financials as well as on Citibank&#146;s website at
http://citibank.ar.wilink.com (enter &#147;Nokia&#148; in the Company Name Search). Holders may also request a hard copy of this annual report by calling the toll-free number 1-877-NOKIA-ADR (1-877-665-4223), or by directing a written request to
Citibank, N.A., Shareholder Services, PO Box 43077, Providence, RI 02940-3081, United States. With each annual distribution of our proxy materials, we offer our record holders of ADRs the option of receiving all of these documents electronically in
the future. </P></DIV><div style="clear:both; height:0pt; font-size:0pt">&nbsp;</div>

 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia in 2014 </P>
<p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
 <DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:14pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT COLOR="#6d6e71">At Nokia, we&#146;re excited by where technology will lead us. We&#146;re reimagining a world where
technology blends into our lives. Technology that works for us, discreetly yet magically in the background, enriching our lives. </FONT></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:14pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT COLOR="#6d6e71">But
for some, this new technology world, where everything and everybody are connected, can be challenging. Fear of intrusion, technology that seems hard to understand or control, and the complexity of choice, can be overwhelming. </FONT></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:14pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT COLOR="#6d6e71">That&#146;s why our focus is, and has always been, on people. We work together, with our partners, customers, and across our businesses, to create
human technology that helps people thrive. Effortless, simple, and intuitive technology, designed to enable new and extraordinary experiences in people&#146;s lives each day. </FONT></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:14pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT COLOR="#6d6e71">We see the possibilities of technology. The human possibilities. </FONT></P> <P STYLE="font-size:30pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:10pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Read more online: company.nokia.com
</P></DIV><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:right; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
</DIV><div style="clear:both; height:0pt; font-size:0pt">&nbsp;</div>

 <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL" ALIGN="right">NOKIA ANNUAL REPORT ON FORM 20-F
2014 </P>


<p Style='page-break-before:always'>
<HR  SIZE="3" style="COLOR:#999999" WIDTH="100%" ALIGN="CENTER">
<h5 align="left"><a href="#toc">Table of Contents</a></h5>

<DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">The year 2014 was one of fundamental change for Nokia, a new chapter in our storied history, which stretches back to the
founding of a small paper mill in southern Finland in 1865. Following the sale of substantially all of our Devices&nbsp;&amp; Services business to Microsoft (the &#147;Sale of the D&amp;S Business&#148;), which was completed on April&nbsp;25, 2014,
Nokia emerged with three businesses &#150; Nokia Networks, HERE and Nokia Technologies &#150; and a significantly improved financial footing. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Networks
provides trusted mobile connectivity infrastructure and services; HERE is our mapping and location intelligence business; and Nokia Technologies is our engine for future innovation and licensing. These three businesses are leaders in their
respective fields, key participants in the rapidly
</P></DIV><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:right; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">
evolving world of technology which is as much about connecting things as about connecting people. We expect to see more than 50 billion connected things &#150; devices, modules and sensors &#150;
by year 2025. The opportunity is extraordinary &#150; not just for us, but for the world at large. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">We have a powerful role to play in this increasingly connected
world. We see ourselves as an enabler, opening and creating possibilities for our customers, partners and consumers. Modern-day Nokia&#146;s focus is, and always has been, on connecting people. Thus, we aim to expand the human possibilities of
technology. </P></DIV><div style="clear:both; height:0pt; font-size:0pt">&nbsp;</div>
 <P STYLE="font-size:24pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL"><A NAME="toc"></A>Contents </P>

<h5 align="left"><a href="#toc">Table of Contents</a></h5>


 <P STYLE="font-size:12pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P> <P STYLE="margin-top:12pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL"><A NAME="tx861743_2"></A>Nokia at a glance
</P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </B></P>
<p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:14pt; font-family:ARIAL">Our three businesses are leaders in their respective fields, key participants in the rapidly evolving world of
technology which is as much about connecting things as about connecting people. </P>
<P STYLE="font-size:12pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;
</P><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Our focus </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">We are focused on
three businesses: network infrastructure software, hardware and services, which we offer through Nokia Networks; mapping and location intelligence, which we provide through HERE; and advanced technology development and licensing, which we pursue
through Nokia Technologies. Each of these businesses is a leader in its respective field. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Through our three businesses, we have a global presence with operations
and research and development (&#147;R&amp;D&#148;) facilities in Europe, North America and Asia, sales in approximately 140 countries, and we employ approximately 62&nbsp;000 people. We are also a major investor in R&amp;D, with expenditure through
the three businesses amounting to more than EUR 2.5 billion in 2014. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Net sales 2014 by business </B></P>
<P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">


<IMG SRC="g861743page85a.jpg" ALT="LOGO">
 </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Net sales 2014 by region </B></P> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">


<IMG SRC="g861743page85b.jpg" ALT="LOGO">
 </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Year-on-year change is in parentheses.
</P></DIV><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:right; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:30pt; font-family:ARIAL">140+ </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Sales in over 140 countries in
2014 </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:30pt; font-family:ARIAL">61&nbsp;656 </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Employees at December&nbsp;31, 2014 </P>

 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL"><A NAME="tx861743_1"></A>Overview </P> <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
<DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Nokia Networks </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Networks
is the largest of our businesses. As the world&#146;s mobile broadband specialist, we help our customers to bring their subscribers unrivalled quality of experience, to maximize the value of their subscriber base and to run extremely efficient
mobile networks. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Ranked third in terms of market share in mobile radio networks and telecommunications services, Nokia Networks is a significant player in its
chosen markets and, with sales in over 120 countries, served by approximately 54&nbsp;600 employees, it has the global reach and scale to deliver high-quality solutions to the largest operators. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Networks has more than 100 years of experience in telecommunications, from 2G to 3G to 4G (&#147;LTE&#148;) and now the emerging 5G, and it has always been &#151;
and intends to remain &#151; at the cutting edge of mobile technology. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>HERE </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">HERE is a global leader in the mapping and location intelligence business. HERE builds high-definition (&#147;HD&#148;) maps and combines them with cloud technology to
enable rich, real-time location experiences in a broad range of connected devices from smartphones and tablets to wearables and vehicles. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">In the automotive segment
HERE is a clear leader, with its maps powering four out of five in-car navigation systems in North
</P></DIV><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:right; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">
America and Europe, and its location platform is used by leading internet companies. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">All in all, more than
13&nbsp;million cars were sold with HERE maps on board during 2014. HERE offers maps for more than 190 countries, drive navigation for 118 countries and live traffic information for 44 countries. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Nokia Technologies </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Technologies is a leading innovator of the core
technologies enabling the Programmable World, where everything and everyone will be connected. Nokia Technologies is expanding Nokia&#146;s successful patent licensing program and licensing proprietary technologies to enable its customers to build
better products. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Technologies is also helping customers leverage the value of the Nokia brand in the consumer device space, starting with the Nokia N1
Android<SUP STYLE="font-size:85%; vertical-align:top">TM</SUP> tablet.<SUP STYLE="font-size:85%; vertical-align:top">(2)</SUP> </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Finally, the Nokia Technologies
incubation program focuses on developing new ideas and prototypes. All of these activities are supported by its world-class Nokia Labs R&amp;D team, which is continuing more than two decades of Nokia leadership in multimedia, connectivity, sensing
and material technologies as well as imaging, audio, web and cloud technologies. </P></DIV><div style="clear:both; height:0pt; font-size:0pt">&nbsp;</div>
 <P STYLE="font-size:12pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>

 <P STYLE="margin-top:12pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL"><A NAME="tx861743_3"></A>2014 - A year of reinvention </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </P>
<p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:14pt; font-family:ARIAL">2014 </P> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<TABLE CELLSPACING="0" CELLPADDING="0" WIDTH="100%" BORDER="0" STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:8.5pt" ALIGN="center">


<TR>
<TD WIDTH="27%"></TD>
<TD VALIGN="bottom" WIDTH="2%"></TD>
<TD WIDTH="23%"></TD>
<TD VALIGN="bottom" WIDTH="1%"></TD>
<TD WIDTH="22%"></TD>
<TD VALIGN="bottom" WIDTH="1%"></TD>
<TD WIDTH="21%"></TD></TR>


<TR STYLE="font-family:ARIAL; font-size:14pt">
<TD VALIGN="top">March</TD>
<TD VALIGN="bottom"></TD>
<TD VALIGN="top">April</TD>
<TD VALIGN="bottom"></TD>
<TD VALIGN="top">May</TD>
<TD VALIGN="bottom"></TD>
<TD VALIGN="top">June</TD></TR>
<TR STYLE="font-size:1pt">
<TD HEIGHT="8" COLSPAN="7"></TD></TR>
<TR STYLE="font-size:1px; ">
<TD COLSPAN="7" VALIGN="bottom"> <P STYLE="border-top:1.00px solid #000000">&nbsp;</P></TD></TR>
<TR STYLE="font-family:ARIAL; font-size:8.5pt">
<TD VALIGN="top"> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>March&nbsp;24, 2014</B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:1pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Networks completed the
acquisition of Mesaplexx, Pty Ltd, including its compact, high-performance radio frequency filter technology which can be used to reduce the size of a radio base station.</P></TD>
<TD VALIGN="bottom"></TD>
<TD VALIGN="top"> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>April 25, 2014</B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia completed the sale of substantially
all of its Devices &amp; Services business to Microsoft. The transaction, which also included an agreement to license patents to Microsoft, was originally announced on September 3, 2013.</P>
<P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>April 29, 2014:</B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; margin-left:1.18em; text-indent:-1.18em; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:'WINGDINGS 2'">&#161;</FONT></FONT> &nbsp;The Nokia Board of
Directors appointed Rajeev Suri as the President and Chief Executive Officer of Nokia Corporation and announced the appointment of the Nokia Group Leadership Team effective as of May 1, 2014.</P>
<P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; margin-left:1.18em; text-indent:-1.18em; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT
STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:'WINGDINGS 2'">&#161;</FONT></FONT> &nbsp;Nokia announced its new strategy that builds on its three businesses: Nokia Networks, HERE and Nokia Technologies.</P> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:1pt; margin-left:1.18em; text-indent:-1.18em; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:'WINGDINGS 2'">&#161;</FONT></FONT> &nbsp;Nokia announced
plans for a EUR 5 billion capital structure optimization program focused on recommencing dividend payments, distributing excess capital to shareholders, and reducing interest-bearing debt.</P></TD>
<TD VALIGN="bottom"></TD>
<TD VALIGN="top"> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>May 12 and May 15, 2014</B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia&#146;s credit rating was
upgraded by both Moody&#146;s and Standard &amp; Poor&#146;s, respectively, supporting Nokia&#146;s long-term target of re-establishing its investment grade credit rating.</P> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>May 28, 2014</B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:1pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">HERE completed the acquisition of Desti, which helps travelers
find what they are looking for by using artificial intelligence and natural language processing technology.</P></TD>
<TD VALIGN="bottom"></TD>
<TD VALIGN="top"> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>June 17, 2014</B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:1pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia&#146;s Annual General Meeting resolved
to distribute an ordinary dividend of EUR&nbsp;0.11 per share for the fiscal year 2013 and a special dividend of EUR&nbsp;0.26 per share. The Annual General Meeting also selected a new Board of Directors for a term ending at the close of the Annual
General Meeting in 2015. Risto Siilasmaa continued to serve as the Chairman of the Board of Directors.</P></TD></TR>
<TR STYLE="font-size:1pt">
<TD HEIGHT="8" COLSPAN="7"></TD></TR>
<TR STYLE="font-size:1px; ">
<TD COLSPAN="7" VALIGN="bottom"> <P STYLE="border-top:1.00px solid #000000">&nbsp;</P></TD></TR>
</TABLE> <P STYLE="margin-top:12pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>April 25, 2014 </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:3pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:16pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia completed the sale of
substantially all of its Devices &amp; Services business to Microsoft. The transaction, which also included an agreement to license patents to Microsoft, was originally announced on September 3, 2013. </P>
 <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>

 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL">Overview </P> <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>

<TABLE CELLSPACING="0" CELLPADDING="0" WIDTH="100%" BORDER="0" STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:6.5pt" ALIGN="center">

<TR STYLE="font-family:ARIAL; font-size:14pt">
<TD VALIGN="top">July</TD>

<TR STYLE="font-size:1px; ">
<TD COLSPAN="9" VALIGN="bottom"> <P STYLE="border-top:1.00px solid #000000">&nbsp;</P></TD></TR>
<TR STYLE="font-family:ARIAL; font-size:8.5pt">
<TD VALIGN="top" STYLE="BORDER-BOTTOM:1px solid #000000"> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>July&nbsp;2, 2014</B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">HERE completed the acquisition of Medio Systems Inc., a pioneer in the emerging field of real-time predictive analytics. Through the acquisition, HERE will be able to
more quickly deliver on its vision to create maps and location services across screens and operating systems that change according to the situation.</P> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>July&nbsp;3, 2014</B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Networks acquired a broad solution for advanced
geolocation capabilities from NICE Systems to enhance the planning and optimization of mobile networks.</P> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>July&nbsp;24, 2014</B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia announced the appointment of Ramzi Haidamus as
President of Nokia Technologies and as a member of the Nokia Group Leadership Team.</P> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>July&nbsp;31, 2014</B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Networks announced its intention to acquire part of
the wireless networks business of Panasonic System Networks Company Limited, enhancing Nokia Networks&#146;<BR>existing mobile broadband capabilities. The transaction was completed on January&nbsp;1, 2015.</P>
<P STYLE="font-size:2pt; margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:1pt">&nbsp;</P></TD>
<TD VALIGN="bottom" STYLE="BORDER-BOTTOM:1px solid #000000"></TD>
<TD VALIGN="top" STYLE="BORDER-BOTTOM:1px solid #000000"> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>August 22, 2014</B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:1pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Networks completed the acquisition of SAC Wireless, a premier self-performing provider of infrastructure and network deployment solutions. The acquisition builds
upon Nokia Networks&#146; existing network implementation service capabilities and is expected to increase its market share in this space.</P></TD>
<TD VALIGN="bottom" STYLE="BORDER-BOTTOM:1px solid #000000"></TD>
<TD VALIGN="top" STYLE="BORDER-BOTTOM:1px solid #000000"> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>September 22, 2014</B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:1pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia returned to the Euro STOXX 50 Index.</P></TD>
<TD VALIGN="bottom" STYLE="BORDER-BOTTOM:1px solid #000000"></TD>
<TD VALIGN="top" STYLE="BORDER-BOTTOM:1px solid #000000"> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>October 23, 2014</B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:1pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia announced the appointment of Sean Fernback as President of HERE, Nokia&#146;s mapping and location intelligence business, and as a member of the Nokia Group
Leadership Team.</P></TD>
<TD VALIGN="bottom" STYLE="BORDER-BOTTOM:1px solid #000000"></TD>
<TD VALIGN="top" STYLE="BORDER-BOTTOM:1px solid #000000"> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>November 14, 2014</B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia held its Capital Markets Day event in London, the United Kingdom, where the company shared its updated vision, strategic priorities and long-term financial
targets.</P> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>November 18, 2014</B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:1pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia announced the launch of the Nokia N1, the first Nokia-branded Android tablet and its first brand-licensed consumer device following the sale of substantially all
of the Devices &amp; Services business. Nokia&#146;s original equipment manufacturer partner started sales in Q1&nbsp;2015 in China, with other markets to follow.</P></TD></TR>
</TABLE> <P STYLE="margin-top:12pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:6.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>April 29, 2014 </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:3pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:16pt; font-family:ARIAL">Rajeev Suri was appointed
the President and CEO of Nokia Corporation, the Nokia Group Leadership Team was appointed, and Nokia&#146;s new strategy and a EUR 5bn capital structure optimization program were announced. </P>
 <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>

</P><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Organizational structure and reportable segments </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">We have three businesses and four operating and reportable segments for financial reporting purposes. These operating and reportable segments are Mobile Broadband and
Global Services within Nokia Networks, HERE, and Nokia Technologies. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Group Common Functions consist of Group level functions that support our three businesses.
</P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">As a result of the Sale of the D&amp;S Business, we report certain separate information for Discontinued operations. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Beginning in the third quarter 2013, Nokia has reported financial information for the two operating and reportable segments within Nokia Networks: Mobile Broadband and
Global Services. As of the fourth quarter
</P></DIV><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:right; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">

 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">
2013, the Devices&nbsp;&amp; Services business has been reported under Discontinued operations. To reflect these changes historical results for past periods have been regrouped for comparative
purposes. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">For the breakdown of our net sales and other operating results by category of activity and geographical location, refer to &#147;Operating and financial
review and prospects&#151;Results of operations&#148; and Note 2, Segment information, of our consolidated financial statements included in this annual report on Form 20-F. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Continuing operations </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Our three businesses: Nokia Networks, HERE, and Nokia
Technologies (jointly, &#147;Continuing operations&#148;) are presented from page 16 onwards. </P></DIV><div style="clear:both; height:0pt; font-size:0pt">&nbsp;</div>

 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL"><A NAME="tx861743_6"></A>Letter from the President and CEO </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </P>
<p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
<DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:14pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT COLOR="#4d4d4d">The year 2014 was a remarkable turning point for Nokia &#150; k&auml;&auml;nnekohta, as the Finns
would say, in the fullest sense of the term. </FONT></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">We moved from a position of weakness to one of strength; from losses to profits; from cash burn to cash
generation; from rapidly narrowing options to a world where our future is bright and our challenge is not the lack of exciting opportunities, but rather choosing from among them. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">In the first half of 2014, completing the sale of substantially all of our Devices&nbsp;&amp; Services business to Microsoft was the primary focus, and this was done in
April. In an ideal world, the Devices&nbsp;&amp; Services business would have had a different fate, but we lost ground to other players who disrupted the sector. Given this, we chose to sell the Devices&nbsp;&amp; Services business to Microsoft, a
transaction that made particular sense in light of our earlier acquisition of Siemens&#146; share of what was then Nokia Siemens Networks. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">These two transactions
were central to the creation of the strong Nokia of today, a company with three powerful businesses, each a leader in their respective segments. Nokia Networks holds leading positions in most segments where it competes, including 4G; HERE is by far
the strongest player in mapping services for the automotive industry; and Nokia Technologies continues to build and license one of the strongest and broadest patent portfolios in our industries.
</P></DIV><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:right; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Our full-year financial results are a testament to the potential of the new Nokia. For 2014, our diluted EPS grew sixfold
versus 2013 to 0.30 euro cents; net sales of EUR&nbsp;12.7&nbsp;billion were roughly flat and our net cash position of EUR&nbsp;5.0&nbsp;billion remained very healthy despite returning some EUR&nbsp;1.8&nbsp;billion to shareholders. Momentum
gathered in the second half of the year in particular, with all three businesses returning to growth. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Profitability was strong at Nokia Networks despite the heavy
R&amp;D investments necessary to build a product and services portfolio that now may very well be the most competitive in the history of the company. The power of that portfolio is reflected in the deals we won in 2014 with customers such as Bharti
Airtel, China Mobile, T-Mobile and Vodafone. Our relentless focus on efficiency delivered hundreds of millions of euros in savings, some of which we reinvested in future-oriented innovation as we move to capture opportunities in LTE, our unique
small cells offering and the transition to virtualization and the Telco Cloud. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:14pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:30pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:ARIAL">&#128;</FONT></FONT>0.30 </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Diluted EPS for Continuing operations in 2014 </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:3pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:30pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT
STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:ARIAL">&#128;</FONT></FONT>1.8bn </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Returned to shareholders in 2014 </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:3pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:30pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:ARIAL">&#128;</FONT></FONT>5bn </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Net cash on December&nbsp;31, 2014 </P></DIV><div style="clear:both; height:0pt; font-size:0pt">&nbsp;</div>

 <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
<TABLE CELLSPACING="0" CELLPADDING="0" WIDTH="100%" BORDER="0" STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:6.5pt" ALIGN="center">

<TR>
<TD WIDTH="51%"></TD>

 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL"><A NAME="tx861743_5"></A>Business overview </P>
<p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
<DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">HERE returned to growth in the second half of the year. In October, we announced we would refocus the business&#146;
strategy on automotive, where momentum is excellent; on enterprise, which is small but growing fast; and on location content for mobile device vendors and internet players. As part of that shift, we deprioritized monetizing our direct-to-consumer
business, but will still deploy apps and other consumer offerings to support our priority areas. In fact, HERE&#146;s Android app has been downloaded extensively and reviews have been very positive. We are also improving HERE&#146;s operational
efficiency, drawing on best practices from across the company. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Technologies took steps to monetize its remarkable patent portfolio, closing new licensing
deals in 2014 with both existing and new customers, many of which are from outside the mobile industry. These deals included a settlement with HTC in February 2014 and the closing of a license agreement with Microsoft in April 2014. We also launched
our first brand-licensed product, the Nokia N1 Android tablet. In 2014, we accelerated investments in Nokia Technologies to ensure we have the pipeline of innovation and business infrastructure needed for future success. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Just as important as what we delivered in the year is how we are positioned for the future. We refreshed the strategies for each of our three businesses; put in place
the Nokia Business System to help optimize our investments, manage performance and develop our talent and future leaders; and honed our portfolio management approach to allocate resources based on their value creation potential. With these actions,
I believe that we are well positioned for future value creation. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">While I am pleased with the above achievements, what I am most proud of is our work to redefine
the company&#146;s values and outline the position to which we aspire. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Let me start with our values: respect, achievement, renewal and challenge. These four simple
words feel natural to who we are at Nokia, and can inspire us for the future. They can provide a foundation for making decisions in the absence of perfect information, and as a guide for behavior, for decision-making, for action. Employees have
responded to the values with enthusiasm, and already they are part of the &#147;glue&#148; that brings the new Nokia together.
</P></DIV><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:right; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Then, our position in the world. As we look to the future, our three businesses are focused on a technological shift that
we believe will be as profound as the creation of the internet itself. We are entering a hyper-connected world where almost all people and tens of billions of devices are all linked together in extraordinary ways; ways that can unleash human
potential and well-being like never before. That is why, at Nokia, we are focused on the human possibilities of technology; on technology grounded in real human needs that is truly in the service of people. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">In 2015, Nokia will celebrate its 150-year anniversary, a longevity that few other companies can match. It is also the 150th anniversary of the birth of Finland&#146;s
national composer, Jean Sibelius, who once said: &#147;Never write an unnecessary note. Every note must live.&#148; That fits well with our belief at Nokia. Our ambitions are big and we are committed to building on the warmth and passion that
continue to live on for our brand and our company. But we are tempered by pragmatism and a belief in getting the maximum benefit for our shareholders from every euro that we spend. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">That is our challenge as a company, and my challenge as its President and Chief Executive Officer. It was a great honor to be appointed Nokia President and CEO in 2014
after an almost 20-year career with the company. My commitment to all of you is to do everything that I can to lead Nokia to future success in the right way: with humility, a commitment to high ethical standards, and a deep belief in the power of
our values and the diversity of the world in which we live. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Rajeev Suri </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">President and CEO </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:30pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT COLOR="#4d4d4d"><B>Nokia&#146;s 150-year anniversary
</B></FONT></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">As we celebrate Nokia&#146;s 150th anniversary, our path has been one of adapting to shifts in markets and technologies. It has taken us from one paper
mill, through participation in many sectors, to our strategic decision to focus on telecommunications. This heritage of change and innovation will continue to shape our future. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Read more on page 120. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:16pt; font-family:ARIAL">&#147;...what I am most proud of is our work to redefine the
company&#146;s values and outline the position to which we aspire.&#148; </P></DIV><div style="clear:both; height:0pt; font-size:0pt">&nbsp;</div>

 <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>

 <P STYLE="margin-top:12pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL"><A NAME="tx861743_7"></A>Our place in a changing world </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </P>
<p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:14pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT COLOR="#4d4d4d">We invest in technologies important in a world where billions of devices are connected, with the
vision to expand the human possibilities of technology. </FONT></P>
<P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;
</P><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">The world is on the edge of a tipping point in technology; a tipping point that will have an impact as profound as the
creation of the internet itself. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Today, most humans are connected. Now, we are quickly entering a totally new phase; a phase that is all about connecting things in
addition to people. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">By 2025, we believe there will be more than 50 billion connected things in the form of devices, modules and sensors. In time, all these
connected things will come together in extraordinary ways. Software will be the glue, analytics and intelligence will bring meaning, and automated action will bring simplicity and efficiency. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">The human benefits have the potential to be extraordinary: </P> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<TABLE STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:8.5pt" BORDER="0" CELLPADDING="0" CELLSPACING="0" WIDTH="100%">
<TR>
<TD WIDTH="11" VALIGN="top" ALIGN="left"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:'WINGDINGS 2'">&#161;</FONT></FONT></TD>
<TD ALIGN="left" VALIGN="top">significantly fewer fatalities and injuries as well as sharply reduced emissions through intelligent cars and, ultimately, fully autonomous driving; </TD></TR></TABLE>
<P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<TABLE STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:8.5pt" BORDER="0" CELLPADDING="0" CELLSPACING="0" WIDTH="100%">
<TR>
<TD WIDTH="11" VALIGN="top" ALIGN="left"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:'WINGDINGS 2'">&#161;</FONT></FONT></TD>
<TD ALIGN="left" VALIGN="top">better use of scarce resources through precision agriculture and improved water management; </TD></TR></TABLE> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<TABLE STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:8.5pt" BORDER="0" CELLPADDING="0" CELLSPACING="0" WIDTH="100%">
<TR>
<TD WIDTH="11" VALIGN="top" ALIGN="left"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:'WINGDINGS 2'">&#161;</FONT></FONT></TD>
<TD ALIGN="left" VALIGN="top">more effective health-care as technology enables increased, flexible opportunities for patients to engage with clinicians, take steps to prevent conditions from becoming acute, and better self-manage their care;
</TD></TR></TABLE> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<TABLE STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:8.5pt" BORDER="0" CELLPADDING="0" CELLSPACING="0" WIDTH="100%">
<TR>
<TD WIDTH="11" VALIGN="top" ALIGN="left"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:'WINGDINGS 2'">&#161;</FONT></FONT></TD>
<TD ALIGN="left" VALIGN="top">new levels of business efficiency from pharmaceuticals, power distribution, fleet management and beyond; and </TD></TR></TABLE> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<TABLE STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:8.5pt" BORDER="0" CELLPADDING="0" CELLSPACING="0" WIDTH="100%">
<TR>
<TD WIDTH="11" VALIGN="top" ALIGN="left"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:'WINGDINGS 2'">&#161;</FONT></FONT></TD>
<TD ALIGN="left" VALIGN="top">more leisure time as technology automates the many little things which consume time and effort in our daily lives.
</TD></TR></TABLE></DIV><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:right; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Long-term leadership targeted in three key areas </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">We believe that over the next ten years, billions of connected devices will converge into intelligent and programmable systems that will have the potential to improve
lives in a vast number of areas including transportation and resource consumption, learning and work, health and wellness, and many more. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">We believe we have a
powerful role to play in this increasingly connected world. We see ourselves as a technology leader, opening and creating possibilities for our customers, partners and consumers. Modern-day Nokia&#146;s focus is, and always has been, on connecting
people. Thus, we aim to expand the human possibilities of technology. The opportunities are significant not just for us, but for the world at large. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">This new world
of technology will require: </P> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<TABLE STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:8.5pt" BORDER="0" CELLPADDING="0" CELLSPACING="0" WIDTH="100%">
<TR>
<TD WIDTH="11" VALIGN="top" ALIGN="left"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:'WINGDINGS 2'">&#161;</FONT></FONT></TD>
<TD ALIGN="left" VALIGN="top">connectivity capable of handling massive numbers of devices and exponential increases in data traffic; </TD></TR></TABLE> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<TABLE STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:8.5pt" BORDER="0" CELLPADDING="0" CELLSPACING="0" WIDTH="100%">
<TR>
<TD WIDTH="11" VALIGN="top" ALIGN="left"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:'WINGDINGS 2'">&#161;</FONT></FONT></TD>
<TD ALIGN="left" VALIGN="top">location services that seamlessly bridge between the real and virtual worlds; and </TD></TR></TABLE> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<TABLE STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:8.5pt" BORDER="0" CELLPADDING="0" CELLSPACING="0" WIDTH="100%">
<TR>
<TD WIDTH="11" VALIGN="top" ALIGN="left"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:'WINGDINGS 2'">&#161;</FONT></FONT></TD>
<TD ALIGN="left" VALIGN="top">innovation across a number of technology areas including sensing, radio and low-power operation. </TD></TR></TABLE> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia&#146;s vision is
to be a leader over the long term in these three areas. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:16pt; font-family:ARIAL">&#147;We believe that over the next ten years, billions of connected devices will converge into intelligent
and programmable systems that will have the potential to improve lives in a vast number of areas.&#148; </P></DIV><div style="clear:both; height:0pt; font-size:0pt">&nbsp;</div>

 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL">Business overview </P> <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
<DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>This new world of technology will require: </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:30pt; font-family:ARIAL">Connectivity </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">capable of handling massive numbers of devices and exponential
increases in data traffic; </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:30pt; font-family:ARIAL">Location services </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">that seamlessly bridge between
the real and virtual worlds; and </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:30pt; font-family:ARIAL">Innovation </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">across a number of technology
areas including sensing, radio and low-power operation. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:12pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">We believe that we have a strong financial position and the capacity to continue to make the necessary
investments to remain an innovation leader in the industries in which our three businesses operate. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">The Sale of the D&amp;S Business in 2014 has provided us with a
solid basis for future investment as it also significantly strengthened our financial position, thus supporting our target of re-establishing our investment grade credit rating. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">In this annual report on Form 20-F, we describe the Nokia business as it is today, including our three continuing businesses, but also provide, under &#147;Business
overview&#151;discontinued operations,&#148; information about the Devices&nbsp;&amp; Services business, which was part of the Nokia Group until its sale on April&nbsp;25, 2014. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:30pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT COLOR="#4d4d4d"><B>The human benefits of connecting things </B></FONT></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">More
leisure time as technology automates the many little things which consume time and effort in our daily lives.

 <P STYLE="margin-top:12pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL"><A NAME="tx861743_8"></A>Nokia&#146;s strategy </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </P>
<p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
<DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:14pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT COLOR="#4d4d4d">Our strategy is to develop our three businesses, Nokia Networks, HERE and Nokia Technologies, in
order to realize our vision of becoming a technology leader in the Programmable World and, in turn, to create long-term shareholder value. </FONT></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Our aim, which
builds on our three businesses, is to optimize our business structure to enable each one to efficiently meet its strategic goals. Where financially prudent, we will pursue shared opportunities between our businesses, but not at the expense of focus
and discipline in each. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">We target long-term shareholder value creation by focusing on our three business areas: </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Nokia Networks </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Our Nokia Networks business will continue to invest in
innovative products and services needed by our customers to manage the increase in wireless data traffic, which we expect will grow by approximately 40% annually through to 2025. Our future investments are focused on further strengthening our
position in mobile broadband radio networks through investments in 5G, small cells and radio cloud; becoming the leading network implementation vendor and growing professional services; becoming a domain aggregator in Telco Cloud and expanding our
business through Software Defined Networking (&#147;SDN&#148;) and security solutions; and targeting new opportunities in Internet of Things and data analytics. </P> <P STYLE="font-size:30pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:30pt; font-family:ARIAL">90+ </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Of the world&#146;s 100 largest operators are served by Nokia Networks </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:30pt; font-family:ARIAL">13&nbsp;million </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Cars sold with HERE maps on board in 2014
</P></DIV><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:right; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
</DIV><div style="clear:both; height:0pt; font-size:0pt">&nbsp;</div>

 <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
<TABLE CELLSPACING="0" CELLPADDING="0" WIDTH="100%" BORDER="0" STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:6.5pt" ALIGN="center">

 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL">Business overview </P> <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
<DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>HERE </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Our HERE business will
continue to invest in our location cloud with the aim of making it the leading source of location intelligence and the best experience across many different operating systems, platforms and screens. We aim to increase our focus on our leading
automotive technology business and our small, but fast-growing, enterprise operations. We will remain connected to the innovation of the consumer ecosystem through work with mobile device vendors such as Samsung and internet players such as
Microsoft. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Given our focus in these areas, we have de-prioritized our efforts in the direct-to-consumer field. We also aim to strengthen the operational
effectiveness of HERE to ensure we obtain maximum return on our significant R&amp;D investments and improve long-term profitability. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Nokia Technologies </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Our Nokia Technologies business aims to bolster the further development of our industry-leading innovation portfolio by: </P>
<P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<TABLE STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:8.5pt" BORDER="0" CELLPADDING="0" CELLSPACING="0" WIDTH="100%">
<TR>
<TD WIDTH="11" VALIGN="top" ALIGN="left"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:'WINGDINGS 2'">&#161;</FONT></FONT></TD>
<TD ALIGN="left" VALIGN="top">expanding our successful patent licensing program; </TD></TR></TABLE> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
<TABLE STYLE="BORDER-COLLAPSE:COLLAPSE; font-family:ARIAL; font-size:8.5pt" BORDER="0" CELLPADDING="0" CELLSPACING="0" WIDTH="100%">
<TR>
<TD WIDTH="11" VALIGN="top" ALIGN="left"><FONT STYLE="font-family:Times New Roman"><FONT STYLE="FONT-FAMILY:'WINGDINGS 2'">&#161;</FONT></FONT></TD>
<TD ALIGN="left" VALIGN="top">helping other companies and organizations benefit from our innovations through technology licensing; </TD></TR></TABLE> <P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>

<P STYLE="font-size:6pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>

<TD ALIGN="left" VALIGN="top">product and service incubation, where we will prudently invest in new technologies for use in potential future products and services. </TD></TR></TABLE>
<P STYLE="font-size:30pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT COLOR="#4d4d4d"><B>Nokia Security Center </B></FONT></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Networks opened the Nokia Security Center in Berlin, Germany in December 2014&#151;a hub of expertise focused on strengthening telecommunications security. The
center provides a platform for co-operating with mobile network operators, partners, governments and academic institutes to develop and share security know-how and expertise.

 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL"><A NAME="tx861743_9"></A>Operational governance and leadership </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:20pt; font-family:ARIAL">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </P>
<p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
<DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:14pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT COLOR="#4d4d4d">Nokia has a simple and clear operational governance model, designed to facilitate innovation and
growth. </FONT></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Strong leadership team </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia has a strong and
experienced leadership team that brings diverse experience from telecommunications and technology, finance, sales and operations and many other areas. Most have been essential to the recent transformation of Nokia and turnaround of Nokia Networks
business, and all have been proven at Nokia or in prior leadership roles. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">The Group Leadership Team is responsible for the operative management of the company.
Other key executives include those responsible for Nokia Networks&#146; sales organization and reportable segments as well as other Group executives. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Members of
the Nokia Group Leadership Team </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Rajeev Suri </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>b.1967 </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">President and Chief Executive Officer of Nokia Corporation </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">With more than 25 years
of international experience, Rajeev is a leader with a passion for creating value, generating growth, and delivering technologies that have a positive impact on people&#146;s lives. He joined Nokia in 1995 and has held numerous executive roles in
the company. As CEO of what is now Nokia&#146;s Networks business, Rajeev led a complete turnaround of the company&#146;s performance, resulting in a significant increase in shareholder value. Rajeev lives in Helsinki, Finland. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Timo Ihamuotila </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>b.1966 </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Executive Vice President and Group Chief Financial Officer </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Timo has deep roots in
Nokia, holding various international roles in the company since 1993, and he also had a three year banking stint outside the company during the late 1990s. Timo&#146;s responsibilities in Nokia have ranged from sales to business unit leadership, and
from risk management to treasury and corporate finance. He is firm believer in a corporate culture based on strong values and vision. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Samih Elhage </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>b.1961 </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Executive Vice President and Chief Financial and Operating Officer
of Nokia Networks </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Samih has 25 years of experience in the telecommunications industry, with a successful track record in transforming complex businesses by
creating new operating models, translating into stronger financial performance and sustainable value creation. He joined NSN in 2012 as Chief Operating Officer, in 2013 adding the role of Chief Financial Officer to his responsibilities. Samih serves
on both the Nokia Group Leadership Team and the Nokia Networks Leadership Team.
</P></DIV><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:right; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Sean Fernback </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>b.1963
</B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">President, HERE </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Since training as an engineer 25 years ago, Sean has
combined his entrepreneurial spirit with his passion for technology. He joined HERE in early 2014, leading the team responsible for smartphone app development and providing location services to the likes of Amazon, Microsoft and Samsung. He became
President in November 2014. Before joining HERE, Sean held senior positions at TomTom, TV Compass, Boardbug and Pogo, among others. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Ramzi Haidamus </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>b. 1964 </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">President, Nokia Technologies </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Ramzi is a technology-licensing expert with proven business skills and a strong innovation background. As president of Nokia Technologies, he is continuing Nokia&#146;s
decades-long track record of R&amp;D leadership and pioneering spirit. Before joining Nokia, he spent 17 years helping Dolby Laboratories grow into a world-class licensing company. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:36pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">For the full biographies of the Group Leadership Team, see pages 102 and 103.

 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL">Business overview </P> <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
<DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Nokia Networks Business Leaders </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:3pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Ashish Chowdhary </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>b.1965 </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Executive Vice President and Chief Business Officer, Nokia Networks </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Ashish has
nearly 25 years of international experience in the enterprise and telecom sectors and has a track record of delivering consistently strong results. Ashish has led various regional and global organizations before starting his present assignment in
January 2011 as Head of Customer Operations in Asia, Middle East and Africa market. He has been a member of the Nokia Networks leadership team since 2009. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Igor
Leprince </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>b.1971 </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Executive Vice President, Global Services, Nokia
Networks </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Igor has over 18 years of experience in the telecommunications industry. He stepped to Global Services in 2014 after turning the Middle East&nbsp;&amp;
Africa region to profitable growth and heading the Care and Network Planning&nbsp;&amp; Optimization business lines. Prior to joining the company in 2007, Igor held various management roles for telecom operators and services companies in several
countries. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Marc Rouanne </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>b.1963 </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Executive Vice President, Mobile Broadband, Nokia Networks </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Marc has over 20 years
of international management experience in the telecommunications industry. Since joining Nokia in 2008, he has turned the company into a leader in LTE and a significant global software developer. Marc has extensive experience in executive leadership
bringing advanced mobile technologies to mass market. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Other Group Executives </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Hans-J&uuml;rgen Bill </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>b.1960 </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Executive Vice President, Human Resources </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Hans-J&uuml;rgen has 20 years of
experience in the telecommunications industry. Prior to NSN, he held a range of diverse roles at Siemens, which he joined in 1983. When NSN was formed in 2007, Hans-J&uuml;rgen became Head of West South Europe region. He assumed the role of Head of
Human Resources for NSN in 2009. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Barry French </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>b.1963 </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Executive Vice President, Marketing and Corporate Affairs </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Barry joined Nokia in
2006 and was instrumental in the creation and later turnaround of Nokia&#146;s Networks business. Previous experience includes leadership positions in technology, restructuring and politics. He is a resident of London but is present regularly at the
company&#146;s headquarters in Finland. </P></DIV><DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:right; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Maria Varsellona </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>b.1970
</B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer Maria joined NSN in 2013 from Tetra Pak, where she was the Group General Counsel. Previously, Maria held
senior legal positions in GE Oil&nbsp;&amp; Gas for many years. As an admitted lawyer in Italy and England, Maria started her career in private practice, and she also lectured international contract law at the University of Florence, Italy. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:10pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Our values </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">At Nokia, we want to be proud of what we achieve, but also how we
achieve it. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Our values guide the way we do business: </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Respect </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">means how we treat each other; it is something we work hard to earn from those around us. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Achievement </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">is about working together to deliver superior results, to bring
great products and services to our customers, and to win in the marketplace. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Renewal </B></P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">covers how we develop ourselves, how we grow our business, and how we strive to create the compelling new products and services that disrupt the market. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Challenge </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:2pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Means we will never be complacent, always pushing for better
performance, and perpetually questioning the status quo inside the company and out. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">With the right behaviors, these four simple values can push us to do the right
things in the right way. We can challenge and do so with respect; we can drive for near-term achievement and renew at the same time. Doing so is not always easy, but it can be done&#150; and those people who do so become great leaders, those
companies that do so become great companies. </P></DIV><div style="clear:both; height:0pt; font-size:0pt">&nbsp;</div>

 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL">Business overview </P> <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>

 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL"><B>Nokia Centralized RAN </B></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Major
sporting events and concerts attract thousands of fans, many of them using smartphones to record and share their experiences over social networks. At the packed Hartwall Arena in Helsinki, Nokia&#146;s Centralized RAN solution delivered data uploads
significantly faster than using traditional radio solutions available in the market, while cutting smartphone power consumption by one third. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:18pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:30pt; font-family:ARIAL">2.5 times faster </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Data uploads

 <P STYLE="margin-top:12pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:12pt; font-family:ARIAL"><A NAME="tx861743_10"></A>Nokia Networks </P> <p STYLE="margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt ; font-size:8pt">&nbsp;</P>
<DIV STYLE="position:relative;float:left; margin-right:1%; width:48%;padding-right:9pt;padding-bottom:8pt;overflow:hidden;padding-top:3pt">
 <P STYLE="margin-top:0pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:14pt; font-family:ARIAL"><FONT COLOR="#4d4d4d">The development of ways for machines to communicate, interpret data and act&#151;all without human
intervention&#151;enables people to address some of our biggest global challenges. </FONT></P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">From caring for aging populations to providing clean water and safe
energy to reducing greenhouse gas, the opportunities opened by the Programmable World are seemingly endless. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Nokia Networks will play a leading part in developing
that world. It will provide the networks that carry data traffic from machine to machine to people and it will provide companies and individuals with the intelligence to interpret and use that data. </P>
<P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Through its two segments&#151;Mobile Broadband and Global Services&#151;it is the trusted partner of operators that, between them, have close to five billion
subscribers. Nokia Networks is at the leading edge of technology. At the end of 2014 it had 162 LTE customers and an installed base of 200 WCDMA/HSPA customers and 300 GSM customers. Serving 170 customers, Nokia Networks&#146; Customer Experience
Management (CEM) offerings are well established and it provides Operations Support Systems to the world&#146;s top ten operators. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">Its Global Services teams have so
far delivered 400 multi-vendor projects; they put a new site on air every 100 seconds and manage networks serving 550&nbsp;million subscribers. Nokia Networks takes its customers&#146; investments seriously and its highly efficient Global Delivery
Centers now manage close to one billion network elements. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">A world of opportunities also contains threats. Nokia Networks&#146; focus on security aims to protect
the connected world from security breaches and, as a company, it pays great attention to keeping its employees, suppliers and partners safe. </P> <P STYLE="margin-top:6pt; margin-bottom:0pt; font-size:8.5pt; font-family:ARIAL">For the future, Nokia
Networks will expand its reach, while defending its strong position in its existing markets. As the realms of telecommunications and IT converge, it will continue to support, consult and serve its customers and to help them develop the human
possibilities of technology. </P> <P STYLE="font-size:4pt;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt">&nbsp;</P>
